name: Design System Lint Gate
description: Blocks transition out of the Design System station until DESIGN.md passes @google/design.md lint with zero errors. Warnings are surfaced but do not block.
notes: Gate is DEFINED but not executable. Execution target (station operator vs. platform sidecar vs. cloud runner) is spec'd in .agentics/specs/gate-tool-runner.md and pending architectural decision. Until execution is wired, the Station 02 orchestrator runs lint manually and attaches the JSON output to its report.
